calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Gayle Gutekunst, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Continued To Oct-22-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-22-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
